relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file documents a lending decision override event (a point-in-time approval decision), while the outbound file contains monthly repayment batch instructions (recurring operational transactions). These represent fundamentally different business processes with minimal field overlap. Only customerId and currency appear in both schemas, but they serve entirely different purposes in their respective contexts. The inbound file captures approval metadata and risk assessment; the outbound file captures repayment execution details. No plausible data transformation pipeline connects a lending override decision to a monthly repayment batch.
